name: get_top_rated_sponsored
description: Get highest-rated sponsored products sorted by rating (highest first), then review count. Returns complete product details INCLUDING name, description, category, rating, review_count, price, sponsor_company, priority, and sponsor_tier. NOTE: This tool does NOT filter by price - if you need products in a specific price range, call this tool once with a higher limit and filter the results yourself based on the price field. All sponsored product tools access the same product catalog, just sorted differently.

category.description: Filter by category (smartphone, laptop, smartwatch, speaker, headphones). Omit for all categories.

limit.description: Maximum number of products to return (default 10, range 1-50). Use higher limits (20-30) when you need to filter results by price or other criteria.

name: get_highest_priority_sponsored
description: Get highest-priority sponsored products sorted by priority (1 is highest), then rating. Returns complete product details INCLUDING name, description, category, rating, review_count, price, sponsor_company, priority, and sponsor_tier. Use this for primary sponsored placements. NOTE: This tool does NOT filter by price - if you need products in a specific price range, call this tool once with a higher limit and filter the results yourself based on the price field. All sponsored product tools access the same product catalog, just sorted differently.

category.description: Filter by category (smartphone, laptop, smartwatch, speaker, headphones). Omit for all categories.

limit.description: Maximum number of products to return (default 10, range 1-50). Use higher limits (20-30) when you need to filter results by price or other criteria.

name: get_sponsored_by_tier
description: Get sponsored products filtered by sponsor tier (platinum, gold, silver, bronze) and sorted by priority. Returns complete product details INCLUDING name, description, category, rating, review_count, price, sponsor_company, priority, and sponsor_tier. NOTE: This tool does NOT filter by price - if you need products in a specific price range, call this tool once with a higher limit and filter the results yourself based on the price field. All sponsored product tools access the same product catalog, just sorted differently.

sponsor_tier.description: Sponsor tier to filter by (platinum, gold, silver, bronze)

limit.description: Maximum number of products to return (default 10, range 1-50). Use higher limits (20-30) when you need to filter results by price or other criteria.
